response.original_title: BKFC Fight Night Newcastle 2026: Mick Terrill vs Jay McFarlane
response.overview: In the main event, the BKFC UK Heavyweight Championship is on the line as former champion Mick Terrill faces hard-hitting contender Jay McFarlane.
response.title: BKFC Fight Night Newcastle 2026: Mick Terrill vs Jay McFarlane
